sourceStatus.publicationPolicy: No long SEC source text is embedded; evidence uses short digests and source URL anchors.

summaryKo.oneLine: AI 데이터센터 수요가 수익을 견인하는 한편, 인수·규제·인프라 제약 리스크가 함께 존재하는 3분기 성과.

keyPoints.text: 분기 매출은 570억 600만 달러, 영업이익은 360억 1,000만 달러, 순이익은 319억 1,000만 달러로 당기 실적의 기본 틀이 유지됐다.
매출은 Compute & Networking 50,908과 Graphics 6,098로 구성돼 총 57,006을 만들었고, 구조적으로 Compute & Networking 의존도가 높은 편이다.
총 영업비용은 5,839로, 구성은 R&D 4,705와 SG&A 1,134로 확인돼 연구개발·판매관리 비용 비중이 확대된 운영 구성이었다.

riskChanges.text: 인수·전략적 투자 관련 리스크로 자본 및 경영진 자원의 분산, 수익 실현 불확실성, 정부 승인·규제 동의 또는 금융 조달 지연, 투자 관련 소송, 실사 실패 가능성을 추가 위험으로 제시했다.
기술·시스템·제품·정책·운영 통합과 인력 통합 및 유지가 어려울 수 있어 인수 후 통합 성패가 성과 반영을 지연시킬 수 있다고 명시됐다.
경쟁 당국의 정보요구가 EU, 미국, 영국, 중국, 한국까지 확대되면서 GPU와 CSP 시장, 공급 배분, Foundation models, 고객·공급사·파트너 계약 전반을 계속 점검 중으로, 추가 요청이 이어질 수 있다는 점이 핵심 리스크이다.

businessChanges.text: 매출 성장의 직접 요인은 데이터센터 컴퓨팅 및 네트워킹 플랫폼 기반의 AI 솔루션 수요로 제시돼, 사업 초점이 AI 인프라 확장에 크게 맞춰져 있다.
Blackwell 아키텍처가 Data Center 수익의 다수를 차지해, 성장 모멘텀이 특정 제품 스택 집중형으로 나타난다.
R&D 비용 확장은 보상 및 benefits의 증가(27%)와 compute and infrastructure 증가(83%)가 주요 동인으로 제시돼, AI 확장 단계의 투자 집약적 구조를 뒷받침한다.

financialHighlights.text: 매출 570억 600만 달러, 영업이익 360억 1,000만 달러, 순이익 319억 1,000만 달러는 분기 손익의 핵심 수치다.
총자산은 1,611억 4,800만 달러, 현금및현금성자산은 114억 8,600만 달러로 대차대조표와 유동성 여력을 동시에 확인할 수 있다.

watchItems.text: AI 성장의 중심이 데이터센터이므로, 공시에서 반복된 데이터센터·전력·자본 제약 가능성은 매출실현 속도에 직접적 변수다. 인프라 제약이 실제화되면 Blackwell 중심 성장의 단기 실현력이 약해질 수 있다.
경쟁 당국의 다지역 동시 수집절차는 향후 공급/판매 정책이나 파트너십 조건의 제약으로 이어질 수 있어, 규제 리스크가 실적변동의 선행 신호가 될 가능성이 크다.

evidence.sourceTextDigest: Quarter ended 2025-10-26 revenue = 570억 600만 달러 (USD 57.006B; 57,006 million), XBRL range 2025-07-28..2025-10-26.
Quarter ended 2025-10-26 operating income = 360억 1,000만 달러 (USD 36.01B; 36,010 million), XBRL range 2025-07-28..2025-10-26.
Quarter ended 2025-10-26 net income = 319억 1,000만 달러 (USD 31.91B; 31,910 million), XBRL range 2025-07-28..2025-10-26.
Quarter ended 2025-10-26 total assets = 1,611억 4,800만 달러 (USD 161.148B; 161,148 million), XBRL range instant..2025-10-26.
Quarter ended 2025-10-26 cash and cash equivalents = 114억 8,600만 달러 (USD 11.486B; 11,486 million), XBRL range instant..2025-10-26.

Item 1A. Risk Factors Other than the risk factors listed below, there have been no material changes from the risk factors previously described under Item 1A of our Annual Report on Form 10-K for the fiscal year ended January 26, 2025 and Item 1A of our Quarterly Reports on Form 10-Q for the fiscal quarters ended April 27, 2025 and July 27, 2025. Purchasing or owning NVIDIA common stock involves investment risks including, but not limited to, the risks described in Item 1A of our Annual Report on Form 10-K for the fiscal year ended January 26, 2025, and Item 1A of our Quarterly 33 Reports on Form 10-Q for the fiscal quarters ended April 27, 2025 and July 27, 2025, and below. Any one of those risks could harm our business, financial condition and results of operations or reputation, which could cause our stock price to decline. Additional risks, trends and uncertainties not presently known

We face additional risks related to acquisitions and strategic investments, including the diversion of capital and other resources, including management’s attention; difficulty in realizing a satisfactory return and uncertainties to realize the benefits of an acquisition or strategic investment, if at all; difficulty or inability in obtaining governmental, regulatory approval or restrictions or other consents and approvals or financing; legal proceedings initiated as a result of an 36 acquisition or investment; and potential failure of our due diligence processes to identify significant issues with the assets or company in which we are investing or are acquiring. Additional risks related to acquisitions include, but are not limited to: • difficulty in integrating the technology, systems, products, policies, processes, or operations and integrating and retaining the employees, including k

Competition Authority collected information from us regarding our business and competition in the graphics card and CSP market as 37 part of an ongoing inquiry into competition in those markets. We have also received, and continue to receive, broad requests for information from competition regulators in the European Union, the United States, the United Kingdom, China, and South Korea regarding our sales of GPUs and other NVIDIA products, our efforts to allocate supply, foundation models and our investments, partnerships and other agreements with companies developing foundation models, the markets in which we compete and our competition, our strategies, roadmaps, and efforts to develop, market, and sell hardware, software, and system solutions, and our agreements with customers, suppliers, and partners. We expect to receive additional requests for information in the future. Such requests

Revenue growth in the third quarter was driven by data center compute and networking platforms for accelerated computing and AI solutions. Our Blackwell architectures are the majority of our Data Center revenue. The availability of data centers, energy, and capital to support the buildout of NVIDIA AI infrastructure by our customers is crucial, and any shortage of these resources could impact our future revenue and financial performance. Expanding energy capacity to meet demand is a complex, multi-year process that involves significant regulatory, technical, and construction challenges. In addition, access to capital can be particularly constrained for less-capitalized companies, which may face difficulties securing financing for large-scale infrastructure projects. These limitations could delay customer deployments or reduce the scale of accelerated computing and AI adoption. We continu
